catalog_price:
• $325.00  (Build & Generate Family Tree).

  • This is a one-time cost that covers building the foundation, configuring the architecture, building the root branch, and generating a working prototype of the root's family tree.  Also included, is monitoring and responding to the family tree's clicks.

  • The root branch is configured to display the root's photo, age, year born, year died (if deceased), and a historical narrative.  The root's descendant children are configured (in birth sequence order), and their names are displayed.

  • Next, the root's demographic information is used as a template to generate a working prototype of the root's family tree.

  • After generation, the root's family tree exists, but has no functionality.  The root's family tree will automatically become functional (i.e. respond to clicks), when the root's descendant children begin building their family tree branches (or optional child clicks are added).
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Family Tree).

  • Root Narrative Limited to 200 Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.

  • If root is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $125.00  (Build and Configure Family Tree Branch).

  1. Building (populating) their family tree branches, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree, is how descendant children add themselves and their children to their parent's family tree.

  2. From generation to generation, descendant children (who have children of their own), must build out their family tree branch, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree.

  3. If a descendant child is under age, the parent can opt to add an optional child click to display the under age child's: photo, age, year born, and year died (if deceased).

  4. Activating child clicks is optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Head-of-Family).

  • Family Tree Branch Narrative Limited to 200 Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.

  • If the family branch head is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:
  1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
  2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $15.00  Per (Child Click).

  1. If a descendant child is under age, the parent can opt to add an optional child click to display the under age child's: photo, age, year born, and year died (if deceased).

  2. Activating child clicks is optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Click).
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
    1. Child Photo.
    2. Computed Age.
    3. Year Born.

  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:

    1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
    2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $25.00 Per (Child Narrative).

  1. Child narratives are optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.

  2. Only Family Tree Branches for head-of-family have 200 word narratives included in their price. Child Narratives are at additional cost.

  3. A child narrative can be used to pay a special tribute, memorialize a dearly departed loved one, give praise, or give a synopsis of a person's life story.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Narrative)

  • Child Narrative Limited to 200 Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
